SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT (the "SPA")

This Share Purchase Agreement is made on the 15th day of October 2023 by and between:

1. Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC No. S3456789A, residing at 123 Fictional Road, Singapore 456789, contact number +65 9123 4567, email: emily.tan@example.sg; and

2. Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd., a company incorporated in Singapore with UEN 201234567H, having its registered office at 456 Imaginary Avenue, Singapore 789012.

WHEREAS, Dr. Emily Tan agrees to sell, and Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd. agrees to purchase, 10,000 ordinary shares for a total consideration of SGD 500,000.00.

Please note that the project plan is not included in this agreement, and no project status updates are required as part of the SPA. Further details can be accessed at https://example.sg/user/S3456789A.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this SPA as of the date first above written.
